title: AI Eats the World? A Reality Check with Benedict Evans
content: Tech analyst Benedict Evans discusses AI's current state with Erik Torenberg, examining coding agents, foundation models, infrastructure spending, and software economics. Evans explains why coding became AI's first breakout use case, uses previous platform shifts to contextualize the present moment, and notes that fundamental questions about AI remain unresolved. The conversation explores whether AI models will capture value themselves or serve as infrastructure for future applications, alongside topics of enterprise adoption, consumer behavior, and software's future evolution.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Erik Torenberg, Benedict Evans)
eventKey: eats-world-reality-check-benedict-evans
normalizedTitle: ai eats the world a reality check with benedict evans
representativeSources: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Erik Torenberg, Benedict Evans)
scoreReasoning: 高质量行业分析，帮助理解AI投资热与产业现状的现实差距。
summary: Tech analyst Benedict Evans discusses AI's current state with Erik Torenberg, examining coding agents, foundation models, infrastructure spending, and software economics. Evans explains why coding became AI's first breakout use case, uses previous platform shifts to contextualize the present moment, and notes that fundamental questions about AI remain unresolved. The conversation explores whether AI models will capture value themselves or serve as infrastructure for future applications, alongside topics of enterprise adoption, consumer behavior, and software's future evolution.

content: 安全研究员Kasra在一个精心设计的实验中花费约1500美元，系统性地测试了多款主流LLM的黑客攻击能力。实验方法是他自己构建了一个存在安全漏洞的书评应用BookNook，漏洞类型是Firebase配置错误，而非API本身的问题。这种设计很巧妙…

title: 用 LLM Agent 重构告警排查流程
content: 告警来了，第一反应是打开日志平台搜关键词，切到 APM 看监控曲线，再去链路追踪系统找 trace 详情。三个平台来回切换，最后发现只是上游 GC 抖动导致的瞬间超时，一分钟后就自愈了。这类告警排查通常需要 10～30 分钟，主要耗时不在分析本身，而在于频繁登录不同平台…
source: 开源中国-全部 - 白开水不加糖
